scripts.name: f
scripts.code:
:*://*::
Clipboard =
(
extract all durable project knowledge, decisions, architecture, workflows, bugs, fixes, commands, and next steps into a reusable memory file or update existing ones before I start a fresh chat.
)
Sleep, 200
SendInput, ^v
return

scripts.name: new kaine no
scripts.code:
#SingleInstance Force

Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Chrome, OpenChrome
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Notepad, OpenNotepad
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Calculator, OpenCalc

^y::
Menu, MyMenu, Show
return

OpenChrome:
Run, chrome.exe
return

OpenNotepad:
Run, notepad.exe
return

OpenCalc:
Run, calc.exe
return
